title: hieracium scorzonerifolium subsp. basiglaucum
intro: Hieracium scorzonerifolium subsp. basiglaucum, also known as Hawkweed, is a perennial plant belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help soothe digestive issues and skin irritations. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as providing antioxidant and antiseptic properties. The leaves and flowers of Hieracium scorzonerifolium subsp. basiglaucum can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
